'''Cestus Penitentiary''' was a prison built on [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in [[321 BBY]], on land offered by the [[X'Ting]] near and under [[Kibo Lake]]. When a dozen [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] officers were sent there for twenty years following a disaster on [[Etti IV/Legends|Etti IV]], they contracted with the Penitentiary officials to form what would become [[Cestus Cybernetics]].

The [[Five Families of Cestus Cybernetics]] eventually turned its lower areas into a private retreat.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
*[[The Cestus Deception (abridged audiobook)|''The Cestus Deception'' abridged audiobook]]
